summary: Iteration 18 - Complete Testing of Maestro BQT Dashboard, Sidebar Icons, i18n Translations, Recipe Import API, Menu Engineering, POS Connector, GL Sync. Backend: 18/18 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All key features verified.

issues: 2 duplicate icon pairs found: LUCCCA Dashboard/EchoLayout share same icon, Events Report/Module Diagnostics share same icon (37 total icons, 35 unique = 94.6% unique)

action_items: Minor: Consider using distinct icons for LUCCCA Dashboard vs EchoLayout, and Events Report vs Module Diagnostics
critical_code_review_comments: Maestro BQT Dashboard tab correctly shows 4 KPI cards (Active Events, Total Guests, Pipeline Revenue, Risk Alerts), Upcoming Events list, Quick Actions with data-testid attributes
LUCCCA Dashboard correctly opens Enterprise Command Center (not Maestro BQT) - bug fix verified
Sidebar icons are 94.6% unique (35/37) - 2 duplicate pairs exist but acceptable
i18n sidebar translations present for ES, FR, DE, JA, PT languages in /app/client/i18n.tsx
Recipe Import API returns json-ld source with ingredients and instructions from BBC Good Food
Menu Engineering Matrix shows 6 Stars, 5 Plowhorses, 0 Puzzles, 0 Dogs with full item table
POS Connector shows 5 POS systems (Toast, Aloha, Micros, Square, Clover) with connection management
GL Sync shows 3 platforms (QuickBooks, Sage, Xero) with 3 active connections, 8 GL codes, 21 journal entries
POS and GL sync operations are MOCKED (simulated) - no real external API calls

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All panels load correctly, Maestro BQT Dashboard verified)

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed POS connections and GL connections during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 18 verified: 1) Maestro BQT Dashboard tab with 4 KPI cards, Upcoming Events, Quick Actions (all with data-testid), 2) LUCCCA Dashboard opens Enterprise Command Center (not Maestro BQT), 3) Sidebar icons 94.6% unique (2 duplicate pairs), 4) i18n sidebar translations for ES/FR/DE/JA/PT, 5) Recipe Import API with AI fallback, 6) Menu Engineering Matrix (6 stars, 5 plowhorses), 7) POS Connector (5 systems), 8) GL Sync (3 platforms). All backend APIs working. Test data created with TEST_ prefix.

backend_tests.pos_systems: PASS - Returns 5 POS systems (toast, aloha, micros, square, clover)
backend_tests.pos_full_flow: PASS - Create connection, test, sync all work
backend_tests.gl_full_flow: PASS - Create, activate, add mapping, sync journals all work
backend_tests.gl_dashboard: PASS - Returns 3 active, 3 mappings, 8 GL codes, 21 journal entries
backend_tests.gl_sync_inactive_400: PASS - Returns 400 for inactive connection sync attempt
backend_tests.gl_activate_404: PASS - Returns 404 for nonexistent connection activation

frontend_tests.luccca_dashboard: PASS - Opens Enterprise Command Center (not Maestro BQT)
frontend_tests.maestro_bqt_dashboard: PASS - Dashboard tab shows 4 KPI cards (Active Events, Total Guests, Pipeline Revenue, Risk Alerts)
frontend_tests.maestro_bqt_upcoming_events: PASS - Shows Upcoming Events section with Corporate Gala, Wedding Reception
frontend_tests.maestro_bqt_quick_actions: PASS - Shows Quick Actions with data-testid (timeline, beo, kitchen, financials)
frontend_tests.menu_engineering_panel: PASS - Shows 6 Stars, 5 Plowhorses, 0 Puzzles, 0 Dogs with item table
frontend_tests.pos_connector_panel: PASS - Shows 5 POS system cards with connections and sync buttons
frontend_tests.gl_sync_panel: PASS - Shows 3 active connections, 8 GL codes, 21 journal entries

mocked_apis_list: POS sync (returns menu_items count from DB)
GL journal sync (sums actual GL entries from DB, no real QuickBooks/Sage API calls)
AI recipe import fallback uses real Gemini but only triggers when JSON-LD fails
